artifacts.name: BrickPalette.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Unit and behavioral tests for BrickPalette component — T-FE-BRICK-002-01 through T-FE-BRICK-002-04 plus accessibility and default-state coverage

summary.work_completed: Authored comprehensive unit and behavioral test suite for FR-BRICK-002 (Brick Color Selection Palette). All 4 required test IDs implemented. PR #50 opened on branch feature/9-brick-color-palette-test.
key_findings: BrickPalette.tsx is already fully implemented with LEGO_COLORS, setActiveColor, aria-label, aria-pressed, and title tooltip attributes.
Real Zustand store used in behavioral test T-FE-BRICK-002-04 — exercises full setActiveColor → placeBrick → brick.colorId chain.
title attribute used for tooltip (T-FE-BRICK-002-03) matching component implementation.
All 12 LEGO colors present in colorPalette.ts — satisfies ≥10 requirement.
NFR-A11Y-001 covered: aria-label, aria-pressed, button element assertions.

human_review_required.reason: Standard human gate before implementation agent proceeds

recommended_actions: Verify BrickPalette.tsx stub is replaced with full implementation (already done in scaffolding).
Verify ColorSwatch.tsx is implemented or merged into BrickPalette.tsx.
Confirm colorPalette.ts has all 12 LEGO colors (already verified).
Confirm setActiveColor action in useBrickStore.ts updates activeColorId (already verified).
Run test suite: npx vitest run src/tests/unit/BrickPalette.test.tsx
Ensure all T-FE-BRICK-002-01 through T-FE-BRICK-002-04 pass.
